stories.headline: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave

stories.headline: Murder investigation after teenager reported missing in Blaina
stories.description: A body has been found in the search for Lilly, 14, who was reported missing on Saturday.

stories.headline: Why is Israel being accused of meddling in Colombia presidential election?
stories.description: President Gustavo Petro claims digital manipulation affected the results, but attorney general dismisses allegations.

stories.headline: New pictures show dozens of items bought illegally by Peter Murrell
stories.description: The images include a range of  luxury bags, watches and pens, as well as fresh pictures of a £124,550 motorhome.
